channel.title: Dynamic on Coosis's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Dynamic on Coosis's Blog

item.title: Dynamic WebPage
item.author: 1159727122@qq.com (Coosis)
item.description: Before Everything Else: Remember how last time I promised to update once I learn more? It turned out that the web design contest has two groups: static, and dynamic. I wanted to try do a dynamic website, and oh boy was it a lot to unpack. Static and Dynamic? According to wikipedia, static web page is a web page that is delivered to a web browser exactly as stored, displays the same information for all user, and often stored in a .
